directions.name: Dark Terminal
directions.typography: tight geometric sans; oversized bold on-screen lines
directions.motion: slow Ken-Burns push-in + hard cuts on the beat
directions.fit: premium, high-contrast, reads instantly on mute

directions.name: Editorial Mono
directions.background: charcoal with a single accent bar
directions.typography: mono for numbers, sans for words; strong hierarchy

selection_rationale: 'Dark Terminal' — highest contrast + instant readability on mute, which is what carries retention in a finance reel.
